tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Mario is a new soul singer, whose musicvideo is broadcasted by MTV.
Hey my friends! When I heard this song for the first time on MTV.com I
was completely fascinated. And because I didn't find neither a tab nor
chords for this song I tried to tab it on my own. So here's what I got:

The notes which fit the song are:

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D#[/ch]

and the progression of chords through the whole song
is:

[ch]D#[/ch] - [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]F[/ch]


[tab][ch]D#[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
6  6  1[/tab]
8  6  1
8  7  2
8  8  3
6  8  3
x  6  1



There is one exception, the bridge. I couldn't figure
out that part by now, maybe you can help me!


[Intro]

[tab] [ch]D#[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Mmmm ..ah...Mmmmm....Yeah....Mmmmm....Yeah, Yeah, Yeah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D#[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]D#[/ch]
Mmmm ..ah...Mmmmm....Yeah....Mmmmm....Yeah-e-Yeah[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby I just don't get it [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Do you enjoy being hurt? [/tab]
[tab]                                                         [ch]D#[/ch]
I know you smelled the perfume, the make-up on his shirt[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bb[/ch]
You don't believe his stories[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]F[/ch]
You know that they're all lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                          [ch]D#[/ch]
Bad as you are you stick around and I just don't know why[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I was ya man (baby you)[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]
Never worry bout (what I do)[/tab]
                                
I'd be coming home (back to you)
[tab]                             [ch]D#[/ch]
Every night, doin' you right [/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're the type of woman (deserves good thangs)[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]F[/ch]
Fist full of diamonds (hand full of rings)[/tab]

Baby you're a star (I just want to show you,you are) 


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]D#[/ch]
You should let me love you [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]   
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D#[/ch]
Baby good love and protection [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Make me your selection [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Show you the way love's supposed to be [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D#[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Baby you should let me love you, love you, love you...loooove you[/tab]

    
yeah 


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D#[/ch]
Listen[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
Your true beauty's description looks so good that it hurts [/tab]

You're a dime plus ninety-nine and it's a shame 
[tab]                                  [ch]D#[/ch]
Don't even know what you're worth [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
Everywhere you go they stop and stare [/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Cause you're bad and it shows [/tab]
[tab]                                                           [ch]D#[/ch]
From your head to your toes, Out of control, baby you know [/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I was ya man (baby you)[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]
Never worry bout (what I do)[/tab]

I'd be coming home (back to you)
[tab]                            [ch]D#[/ch]
Every night doin' you right [/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're the type of woman (deserves good thangs)                                        [/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]F[/ch]
Fist full of diamonds (hand full of rings)[/tab]

Baby you're a star (I just want to show you, you are) 


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]D#[/ch]
You should let me love you [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]   
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D#[/ch]
Baby good love and protection [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Make me your selection [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Show you the way love's supposed to be [/tab]

Baby you should let me...

yeah


[Bridge]


You deserve better girl (you know you deserve better) 

We should be together girl (baby)

With me and you it's whatever girl, hey!

So can we make this thing ours?


Repeat Chorus to the end:

[tab]                  [ch]D#[/ch]
You should let me love you [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]   
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D#[/ch]
Baby good love and protection [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Make me your selection [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Show you the way love's supposed to be [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D#[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Baby you should let me love you, love you, love you...loooove you[/tab]
